members.name: DrawChar
members.signature: public float DrawChar(RID canvasItem, Vector2 pos, int @char, int fontSize, Color modulate, float oversampling)
members.summary: Draw a single Unicode character [param char] into a canvas item using the font, at a given position, with [param modulate] color. [param pos] specifies the baseline, not the top. To draw from the top, [i]ascent[/i] must be added to the Y axis. If [param oversampling] is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used. [b]Note:[/b] Do not use this function to draw strings character by character, use [method draw_string] or [TextLine] instead.

members.name: DrawCharOutline
members.signature: public float DrawCharOutline(RID canvasItem, Vector2 pos, int @char, int fontSize, int size, Color modulate, float oversampling)
members.summary: Draw a single Unicode character [param char] outline into a canvas item using the font, at a given position, with [param modulate] color and [param size] outline size. [param pos] specifies the baseline, not the top. To draw from the top, [i]ascent[/i] must be added to the Y axis. If [param oversampling] is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used. [b]Note:[/b] Do not use this function to draw strings character by character, use [method draw_string] or [TextLine] instead.

members.name: DrawMultilineString
members.signature: public void DrawMultilineString(RID canvasItem, Vector2 pos, String text, int alignment, float width, int fontSize, int maxLines, Color modulate, int brkFlags, int justificationFlags, int direction, int orientation, float oversampling)
members.summary: Breaks [param text] into lines using rules specified by [param brk_flags] and draws it into a canvas item using the font, at a given position, with [param modulate] color, optionally clipping the width and aligning horizontally. [param pos] specifies the baseline of the first line, not the top. To draw from the top, [i]ascent[/i] must be added to the Y axis. If [param oversampling] is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used. See also [method CanvasItem.draw_multiline_string].

members.name: DrawMultilineStringOutline
members.signature: public void DrawMultilineStringOutline(RID canvasItem, Vector2 pos, String text, int alignment, float width, int fontSize, int maxLines, int size, Color modulate, int brkFlags, int justificationFlags, int direction, int orientation, float oversampling)
members.summary: Breaks [param text] to the lines using rules specified by [param brk_flags] and draws text outline into a canvas item using the font, at a given position, with [param modulate] color and [param size] outline size, optionally clipping the width and aligning horizontally. [param pos] specifies the baseline of the first line, not the top. To draw from the top, [i]ascent[/i] must be added to the Y axis. If [param oversampling] is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used. See also [method CanvasItem.draw_multiline_string_outline].

members.name: DrawString
members.signature: public void DrawString(RID canvasItem, Vector2 pos, String text, int alignment, float width, int fontSize, Color modulate, int justificationFlags, int direction, int orientation, float oversampling)
members.summary: Draw [param text] into a canvas item using the font, at a given position, with [param modulate] color, optionally clipping the width and aligning horizontally. [param pos] specifies the baseline, not the top. To draw from the top, [i]ascent[/i] must be added to the Y axis. If [param oversampling] is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used. See also [method CanvasItem.draw_string].

members.name: DrawStringOutline
members.signature: public void DrawStringOutline(RID canvasItem, Vector2 pos, String text, int alignment, float width, int fontSize, int size, Color modulate, int justificationFlags, int direction, int orientation, float oversampling)
members.summary: Draw [param text] outline into a canvas item using the font, at a given position, with [param modulate] color and [param size] outline size, optionally clipping the width and aligning horizontally. [param pos] specifies the baseline, not the top. To draw from the top, [i]ascent[/i] must be added to the Y axis. If [param oversampling] is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used. See also [method CanvasItem.draw_string_outline].

members.name: FindVariation
members.signature: public RID FindVariation(Dictionary variationCoordinates, int faceIndex, float strength, Transform2D transform, int spacingTop, int spacingBottom, int spacingSpace, int spacingGlyph, float baselineOffset, int paletteIndex, PackedColorArray customColors)
members.summary: Returns [TextServer] RID of the font cache for specific variation.

members.name: GetAscent
members.summary: Returns the maximum font ascent (number of pixels above the baseline) of this font and all fallback fonts. [b]Note:[/b] Real ascent of the string is context-dependent and can be significantly different from the value returned by this function. Use it only as rough estimate (e.g. as the ascent of empty line).

members.name: GetCharSize
members.summary: Returns the size of a character. Does not take kerning into account. [b]Note:[/b] Do not use this function to calculate width of the string character by character, use [method get_string_size] or [TextLine] instead. The height returned is the font height (see also [method get_height]) and has no relation to the glyph height.

members.name: GetDescent
members.summary: Returns the maximum font descent (number of pixels below the baseline) of this font and all fallback fonts. [b]Note:[/b] Real descent of the string is context-dependent and can be significantly different from the value returned by this function. Use it only as rough estimate (e.g. as the descent of empty line).

members.name: GetFaceCount
members.summary: Returns number of faces in the TrueType / OpenType collection.

members.name: GetFontName
members.summary: Returns font family name.

members.name: GetFontStretch
members.summary: Returns font stretch amount, compared to a normal width. A percentage value between [code]50%[/code] and [code]200%[/code].

members.name: GetFontStyle
members.summary: Returns font style flags.

members.name: GetFontStyleName
members.summary: Returns font style name.

members.name: GetFontWeight
members.summary: Returns weight (boldness) of the font. A value in the [code]100...999[/code] range, normal font weight is [code]400[/code], bold font weight is [code]700[/code].

members.name: GetHeight
members.summary: Returns the total average font height (ascent plus descent) in pixels. [b]Note:[/b] Real height of the string is context-dependent and can be significantly different from the value returned by this function. Use it only as rough estimate (e.g. as the height of empty line).

members.name: GetMultilineStringSize
members.signature: public Vector2 GetMultilineStringSize(String text, int alignment, float width, int fontSize, int maxLines, int brkFlags, int justificationFlags, int direction, int orientation)
members.summary: Returns the size of a bounding box of a string broken into the lines, taking kerning and advance into account. See also [method draw_multiline_string].

members.name: GetOpentypeFeatures
members.summary: Returns a set of OpenType feature tags. More info: [url=https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/opentype/spec/featuretags]OpenType feature tags[/url].

members.name: GetOtNameStrings
members.summary: Returns [Dictionary] with OpenType font name strings (localized font names, version, description, license information, sample text, etc.).

members.name: GetPaletteColors
members.summary: Returns the array in the predefined color palette at [param index]. Palette contains all colors used to render font glyphs. Each palette has the same number of colors. Colors can be overridden using [FontVariation].

members.name: GetPaletteCount
members.summary: Returns the number of predefined color palettes. Palette contains all colors used to render font glyphs. Each palette has the same number of colors.

members.name: GetPaletteName
members.summary: Returns the name of the predefined color palette at [param index]. Palette contains all colors used to render font glyphs. Each palette has the same number of colors.

members.name: GetRids
members.summary: Returns [Array] of valid [Font] [RID]s, which can be passed to the [TextServer] methods.

members.name: GetSpacing
members.summary: Returns the amount of spacing for the given [param spacing] type.

members.name: GetStringSize
members.signature: public Vector2 GetStringSize(String text, int alignment, float width, int fontSize, int justificationFlags, int direction, int orientation)
members.summary: Returns the size of a bounding box of a single-line string, taking kerning, advance and subpixel positioning into account. See also [method get_multiline_string_size] and [method draw_string]. For example, to get the string size as displayed by a single-line Label, use: [codeblocks] [gdscript] var string_size = $Label.get_theme_font("font").get_string_size($Label.text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, $Label.get_theme_font_size("font_size")) [/gdscript] [csharp] Label label = GetNode<Label>("Label"); Vector2 stringSize = label.GetThemeFont("font").GetStringSize(label.Text, HorizontalAlignment.Left, -1, label.GetThemeFontSize("font_size")); [/csharp] [/codeblocks] [b]Note:[/b] Since kerning, advance and subpixel positioning are taken into account by [method get_string_size], using separate [method get_string_size] calls on substrings of a string then adding the results together will return a different result compared to using a single [method get_string_size] call on the full string. [b]Note:[/b] Real height of the string is context-dependent and can be significantly different from the value returned by [method get_height].

members.name: GetSupportedChars
members.summary: Returns a string containing all the characters available in the font. If a given character is included in more than one font data source, it appears only once in the returned string.

members.name: GetSupportedFeatureList
members.summary: Returns list of OpenType features supported by font.

members.name: GetSupportedVariationList
members.summary: Returns list of supported [url=https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/opentype/spec/dvaraxisreg]variation coordinates[/url], each coordinate is returned as [code]tag: Vector3i(min_value,max_value,default_value)[/code]. Font variations allow for continuous change of glyph characteristics along some given design axis, such as weight, width or slant. To print available variation axes of a variable font: [codeblock] var fv = FontVariation.new() fv.base_font = load("res://RobotoFlex.ttf") var variation_list = fv.get_supported_variation_list() for tag in variation_list: var name = TextServerManager.get_primary_interface().tag_to_name(tag) var values = variation_list[tag] print("variation axis: %s (%d)\n\tmin, max, default: %s" % [name, tag, values]) [/codeblock] [b]Note:[/b] To set and get variation coordinates of a [FontVariation], use [member FontVariation.variation_opentype].

members.name: GetUnderlinePosition
members.summary: Returns average pixel offset of the underline below the baseline. [b]Note:[/b] Real underline position of the string is context-dependent and can be significantly different from the value returned by this function. Use it only as rough estimate.

members.name: GetUnderlineThickness
members.summary: Returns average thickness of the underline. [b]Note:[/b] Real underline thickness of the string is context-dependent and can be significantly different from the value returned by this function. Use it only as rough estimate.

members.name: HasChar
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a Unicode [param char] is available in the font.

members.name: IsLanguageSupported
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the font supports the given language (as a [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_639-1]ISO 639[/url] code).

members.name: IsScriptSupported
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the font supports the given script (as a [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_15924]ISO 15924[/url] code).

members.name: SetCacheCapacity
members.signature: public void SetCacheCapacity(int singleLine, int multiLine)
members.summary: Sets LRU cache capacity for [code]draw_*[/code] methods.

members.name: Fallbacks
members.summary: Array of fallback [Font]s to use as a substitute if a glyph is not found in this current [Font]. If this array is empty in a [FontVariation], the [member FontVariation.base_font]'s fallbacks are used instead.
